title: What's new in Cloud SQL: Drive performance, high availability, and security
summary: Google Cloud SQL introduces AI-driven automated health management and fleet-wide insights across MySQL, PostgreSQL, and SQL Server. The update emphasizes performance optimization, high availability, security, and cloud migration facilitation through Database Migration Service.
writeup: This video reviews recent Cloud SQL updates across MySQL, PostgreSQL, and SQL Server, centered on AI-driven automated health management and fleet-wide insights. It covers performance optimization, high availability, and security, plus migration via Database Migration Service. The takeaways: health management is automated and monitoring spans an entire database fleet rather than single instances, and migration into Cloud SQL is handled through Database Migration Service.
